serverInfo.name: com.sap.s4/dispute-service
serverInfo.title: SAP S/4HANA Dispute Service MCP Server
serverInfo.description: MCP server for managing disputes in SAP S/4HANA via the Dispute Service OData API

tools.name: list_disputes
tools.title: List Disputes
tools.description: Retrieve disputes from SAP S/4HANA. Use filter for queries and select to choose specific fields.

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: OData filter expression. Example: ID eq '1000000' or Subject eq 'important'.

parameters.name: select
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields (without spaces) to return.

parameters.name: top
parameters.description: Maximum number of records to return. Use for pagination.

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: Number of records to skip. Use for pagination.

parameters.name: orderby
parameters.description: Field(s) to sort by. Example: LastName asc or BusinessPartner desc.

tools.name: create_dispute
tools.title: Create Dispute
tools.description: Create a new dispute case in SAP S/4HANA. Provide the required fields and optional attributes.

tools.name: update_dispute
tools.title: Update Dispute
tools.description: Update an existing dispute case in SAP S/4HANA by providing the dispute ID and the fields to change.

tools.name: delete_dispute
tools.title: Delete Dispute
tools.description: Delete a dispute case in SAP S/4HANA.
